category_sources: source_facts.description says RabbitMQ is a messaging and streaming broker; official RabbitMQ docs describe broker documentation for developers and administrators.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rabbitmq; official website and docs use the display name RabbitMQ.
docs_sources: Official RabbitMQ documentation page is versioned documentation for RabbitMQ 4.3 and links to getting started, install, management, and monitoring docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rabbitmq/rabbitmq-server, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions messaging and streaming broker; source_facts.executables lists rabbitmq-server and administration tools.
